exchanges.user: Create three small text files under /tmp/prewalk_demo/: hello.txt containing a greeting, world.txt containing one fact about the world, and notes.md with a two-line markdown note. Then use bash to list the directory and confirm all three exist. Keep it simple.

turns.label: chat
turns.original: Create three small text files under /tmp/prewalk_demo/: hello.txt containing a greeting, world.txt containing one fact about the world, and notes.md with a two-line markdown note. Then use bash to list the directory and confirm all three exist. Keep it simple.

turns.text: I'll create the three files and then list the directory.

input.content: Hello, there! Welcome to the prewalk demo.
The Earth orbits the Sun at an average distance of about 149.6 million kilometers.

# Notes

This is a quick demo file created during the prewalk.
It contains two simple markdown lines for verification.

tool_blocks.name: bash
tool_blocks.output:
total 12
drwxr-xr-x 1 root root  52 Jul 21 11:48 .
drwxrwxrwt 1 root root 554 Jul 21 11:48 ..
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root  42 Jul 21 11:48 hello.txt
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root 119 Jul 21 11:48 notes.md
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root  82 Jul 21 11:48 world.txt

turns.text:
All three files exist under `/tmp/prewalk_demo/`:

- **hello.txt** (42 bytes) — a greeting
- **world.txt** (82 bytes) — a fact about Earth's orbit
- **notes.md** (119 bytes) — a two-line markdown note (plus a heading)

Directory listing confirms all three are present. Done.
